29th, 2024 ** 32 teams. ** Squad, {{Abbr/TPP}}. * '''Quarter Finals''':'' May 13th - 15th ** 32 teams, 3 matchdays. ** 2 groups, Group Red and Group Blue ** {{bgcolortext|up|Top 12 teams}} from each group (Total 24 teams) advance to ''Semi Finals''. * '''Semi Finals''':'' May 20th - 22nd ** 24 teams, 3 matchdays. **{{bgcolortext|up|Top 16 teams}} qualify for ''Grand Finals''. * '''Grand Finals''':'' May 27th - 29th ** 16 teams. ** 3 matchdays. {{PUBGM 2023 Points System}} ==Prize Pool== {{TeamPrizePool|localcurrency=inr |{{Slot|localprize=1,20,000 |date=2024-05-29|{{Opponent|thw
